name: Kethra, Spark Commander
reasoning: V3 best captures the prompt's core elements: a fierce woman with visible scarring on her face, gripping dual blazing swords wreathed in white-hot flames with excellent spark effects. The dynamic mid-combat stride is clear, the composition is well-balanced with armored fighters emerging from shadow behind her, and the warm sandstone/ivory tones with golden-hour lighting are perfectly executed. V1 lacks visible scarring and the sword lacks the white-hot flame intensity; V2 has only one sword and weaker flame effects, deviating from the "blazing sword" singular focus implied by the prompt.

artifacts_found.issue: Minimal facial scarring despite prompt emphasis; sword flames are orange rather than white-hot; composition less dynamic
Only one sword visible instead of the dual-wielding suggested by prompt; weaker flame effects; less intense action pose
